system.effect: The psyker takes complete control of the target's mind and body. For the duration of the power, the psyker controls all of the target's actions. The target retains awareness but cannot act of their own volition.

description.value: The psyker crushes the will of his target and seizes total control of their mind and body. For the duration of the power, the psyker dictates all of the target's actions, effectively puppeting them. The target is aware of what is happening but is powerless to resist. The target may attempt a new Opposed Willpower test at the beginning of each of their turns to break free.
